sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68088" key="misoposei/dwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσο-ποσείδων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n68088.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hating Poseidon</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg005.perseus-grc1:2:727" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.727</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
